details.reasoning: Perfect implementation. All rubric requirements are met: (1) stepper.tsx marked with 'use client' and exports all required components plus StepperIndicator and useStepper hook; (2) every sub-component uses proper data-slot attributes (stepper, stepper-item, stepper-trigger, stepper-indicator, stepper-title, stepper-description, stepper-separator, stepper-content) and cn() utility for class merging; (3) dual-context pattern (StepperContext and StepperItemContext) properly manages state between components with error handling; (4) orientation prop supports both 'horizontal' and 'vertical' with appropriate layout adjustments in Stepper and StepperSeparator; (5) demo file demonstrates complete functionality with useState for step management and Previous/Next buttons; (6) registry.json and _registry.ts correctly register both stepper UI component and stepper-demo example with proper dependencies; (7) only new files created, no existing component files modified. Code quality is high with proper context hooks, prop forwarding, and accessibility attributes.
